dialogos.texto_en: This is where I wanted to bring you.
Ohh...!
What do you think?\nThe view from this terrace is amazing, isn't it?
(The blue sea, blue sky,\n and buildings with a foreign atmosphere\n along the coast...)
It feels like I'm really on a trip abroad.
This terrace looks even more beautiful\nwhen it's lit up\nin the evening.
And, from here, you can also see the sunset sinking\nbelow the horizon! This place is phenomenal!\nDid you know about this place?
I found it while planning this trip.\nCompletely by chance.
The moment I saw it, I was like, this is it!\nI kind of felt something like destiny.
So, that's why you put American Village on our schedule.
Ehehe...\nWhat a selfish reason to plan something.
Since you worked hard and made the plan,\nit's okay to be a little selfish. Nobody will complain.
Is that so?
Well, for now, I don't have any complaints.\nThanks to you, Yotsuba,\nI was able to see such a wonderful view.
I've been thinking about it since I found it.\nThat, I definitely wanna come here%p-2;――
Just with you, Futaro.
A-ahaha!\nSuddenly calling you by name like that,\nit's a bit shocking, isn't it!
I got carried away by the atmosphere.\nSorry about that.
Don't apologize.
Huh...?
I wasn't surprised.\nI...was just happy.
Haha...\nJust being called by my name makes me so happy.\nI can't believe it a bit myself.
I wonder why?\nWhen you say it,\nit feels like a special word.
N-no need to exaggerate...\nI just called you by your name, right?
Then, there's nothing to be shy about, yes?
O-oh my!
Anyway, let's look at the scenery!\nLook, the sea is shining beautifully!
I was really, really happy\nwhen you called me by name, Yotsuba.
I've always wanted to do it.
You could have done it a little earlier, you know?
Mmhh...\nIt's difficult to change, you know?
I know. I wasn't able to change much either.
(But...\n we'll change little by little from now on.)
I kept this place a secret from everyone.\nBecause, if possible%p-2;――
No.\nI DEFINITELY wanted to see it, just with you.
Can we...\nkeep this place as our secret from now on?
Of course.\nThis is our secret place, just for us two.
Do you promise?
Yeah.
('Is Yotsuba enjoying this trip?')
(I can answer that man's question\n without hesitation now.)
Hey, how about we make one more secret?
...Sure, why not?
(This graduation trip\n has become something irreplaceable\n for both Yotsuba and me...)
(I can truly say that from the bottom of my heart now.)
